docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CURRY, KELVIN DOMINGUEZ, HENRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CURRY, KELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF KELVIN CURRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HENRY DOMINGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURRY, KELVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, HENRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
